features: Revive & Brighten your skin with our Caffeine Boost Serum.
Our serum infuses life in to your skin whilst promoting a bright, youthful glow.
Keep in the fridge and apply AM for an instant wake-up call.
description: Product Description Revive & brighten your skin with our Caffeine Boost Serum. Packed with energising Caffeine (an antioxidant-rich plant extract) and super hydrating Glycerin, our serum infuses life in to your skin whilst promoting a bright, youthful glow. Apply in the morning and say goodbye to tired skin! Ingredients Aqua, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Betaine, Bifida Ferment Filtrate, Sorbeth-30, Caffeine, Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycosphingolipids, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Allantoin, Carbomer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Panthenol, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Xanthan Gum, Disodium EDTA, Cyclohexane, Parfum, Phenoxyethanol, Limonene. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Shake well before use. See more
